creator: exploringlondon
caption:
He really said don’t film me, I’ll film you 🤣 ad

Here’s a list of 4 musical experiences you need to check out in London! Get 15% off the first 3 on the list with code ✨ EXPLORE15 ✨
🎷 @leo_green_presents
💖 @sinematic.cabaret 
🎵 @thevanmorrisonalumniband
👯‍♀️ @burlesquethemusicalofficial

transcription.text: Yep that just happened and it was such a good night and if you're looking for more musical experiences like this in London keep watching. This is The Secret Sax Party by Leo Green. They sing a range of classics and they take on requests which makes it so fun and completely different every time. Next up we have The Incredible Cinematic, a mixture of burlesque, stunt and debauchery. It is a scandalous night that's so worth seeing. Next up for the Van Morrison fans, his actual band have created a band called the Van Morrison Alumni Band. They've played thousands of concerts and are so incredibly talented. Last but not least you've got to get Burlesque the Musical on your list. Yes the show is coming back to London this summer and it is a dazzling show with an incredible soundtrack. Find all the info you need in the caption.
